title: cyperus donianus
intro: Cyperus donianus, also known as Donian's sedge, is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family that is native to the tropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Cyperus donianus is often used in the form of teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
